finding_results.evidence: chapters/chapter_17.md:177; chapters/chapter_17.md:187; chapters/chapter_17.md:243; chapters/chapter_17.md:251; chapters/chapter_17.md:263; chapters/chapter_17.md:387
finding_results.notes: Replaced list-only policy stretches with conflict-driven boundary beats and immediate embodied consequences (bench/wind/pen breaks, forced rewrite, and live draft cuts before send).

Consolidated duplicated negotiation loops into one pivot sequence: pre-reveal minor mention term, reporter-risk reveal, then single hard boundary change to full minor removal with downstream family-call consequence.
Inserted multiple explicit Marisol interior beats (self-interrogation, bodily lock, emotional de-escalation) separated by dialogue turns in the targeted exchange span.
Added a non-instructional Luis line with shift/transit-specific lived detail and strengthened his physical beat with character-specific visual markers in the meeting room.
Removed the recurring 'went flat' construction and replaced it with Gloria's command-register stress cue anchored in practical threat timing.

summary: All five packet findings were addressed in-place: boundary architecture now escalates causally with one clear turning-point rule change, Marisol interiority is restored in the late negotiation beats, Luis carries distinct idiolect/physical texture, and Gloria's stress diction no longer uses the flagged flatness formula.
